---
title: "Introduction to dvs CLI"
format: html
execute:
  freeze: auto
---

# Setup

```{r}
library(dvs)
library(fs)
library(here)
```

# Helpers

```{r}
source(here::here("R/mkdatasetfiles.R"))
```

See `vignette/random_files.qmd` for a demonstration of this function.

```{r}
storage <- tempfile(fileext = "_storage", tmpdir = here::here())
new_project <- tempfile(fileext = "_project", tmpdir = here::here())

dir.create(storage)
dir.create(new_project)
```

1x25MB file (large), 3x1MB (small), 50x3MB files (individual):

```{r}
#| warning: false
setwd(new_project)

mkdatasetfiles(n_files = 1,  size_mb = 25, prefix = "large_",      dir = "data/large")
mkdatasetfiles(n_files = 3,  size_mb = 1,  prefix = "small_",      dir = "data/small")
mkdatasetfiles(n_files = 50, size_mb = 3,  prefix = "individual_", dir = "data/individual")
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
setwd(new_project)

dvs_init(storage)
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
cat(readLines(fs::path(new_project, "dvs.toml")), sep = "\n")
```

# CLI

The same operations can be driven from the terminal via the `dvs` binary. For this demonstration we will not invoke the CLI directly — the commands below are shown for reference.

## Add

```{bash}
#| eval: false
dvs add data/large/large_1.csv --message "add one large dataset"
dvs add data/small/ --message "add small corpus datasets"
dvs add "data/individual/individual_*.csv" --message "add individual datasets via glob"
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#| results: hide
setwd(new_project)

invisible(dvs_add("data/large/large_1.csv", message = "add one large dataset"))
invisible(dvs_add(paths = fs::dir_ls("data/small", type = "file"), message = "add small corpus datasets"))
invisible(dvs_add(glob = "data/individual/individual_*.csv", message = "add individual datasets via glob"))
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
setwd(new_project)

meta_files <- fs::dir_ls(".dvs", recurse = TRUE, all = TRUE, glob = "*.dvs", type = "file")
meta_files <- meta_files[!grepl("\\.git", meta_files)]
large_meta <- grep("large_1", meta_files, value = TRUE)

cat(readLines(large_meta, warn = FALSE), sep = "\n")
```

## Status

```{bash}
#| eval: false
dvs status
dvs status --status absent
```

## Get

```{bash}
#| eval: false
dvs get "data/individual/individual_*.csv"
```

# Cleanup

```{r}
unlink(new_project, recursive = TRUE)
unlink(storage, recursive = TRUE)
```
